nasb.text: Poverty and shame will come to him who neglects discipline, But he who regards reproof will be honored.

esv.text: Poverty and disgrace come to him who ignores instruction, but whoever heeds reproof is honored.

cnv.text: 輕忽管教的，必致窮乏受辱； 看重責備的，必得尊榮。

ccb.text: 不受管教的贫穷羞愧， 接受责备的受到尊崇。

csbs.text: 忽视管教的，必受穷受辱； 接受责备的，必得尊荣。
